title: Scrambled Eggs
steps: Crack eggs into a bowl, add milk, salt, and pepper, then whisk until well combined.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over low-medium heat until melted and foamy.
Using a spatula, gently push the eggs from the edges toward the centre as they start to set.
Continue cooking slowly, folding gently, until eggs are just softly set and still slightly glossy.
Remove from heat (carry-over heat will finish cooking them).
Sprinkle with chives if using and serve immediately on toast.
